TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ben_Alexander_(actor), title = Ben_Alexander_(actor), year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ben_Alexander_(actor)} }

S.FORM: Ben Alexander kawas tay 1911, ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 6, Ben Alexander, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1969) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Ben Alexander kawas tay 1911, ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 6, Ben Alexander, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1969) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: βen alexan*er kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, βen alexan*er, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. (wal mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
